title: verbascum × illyricum
intro: Verbascum × illyricum, also known as the Illlyrian mullein or Verbascum × hybrida, is a hybrid of the Verbascum thapsus and Verbascum lychnitis plant species, commonly found in the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and soothe irritated skin. The health benefits of Verbascum × illyricum include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which can aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Verbascum × illyricum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to relieve coughs, colds, and other respiratory problems.
